positive: Minimalist celestial nebula fox silhouette, majestic pose, surrounded by stylized constellations and geometric astronomical patterns. High contrast black and white linework on a pale cream background, with accents of deep indigo and gold foil effect. Centered composition, designed for apparel printing. Art Nouveau influence mixed with modern vector style. Soft diffused spotlighting, crisp edges, intricate detail, highly printable, clean background.
negative: blur, ugly, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, distracting background, gradient, jpeg artifacts, messy, cluttered
